Uses of Interface
org.moeaframework.core.comparator.DominanceComparator

Packages that use DominanceComparator
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.algorithm
Implementations of various algorithms and support tools for working with algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.pso
Implementations of various Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.single
Implementations of various single-objective optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.core
Contains the core classes used by this framework.
org.moeaframework.core.comparator
Contains dominance comparators and other comparators used by this framework.
org.moeaframework.core.fitness
Implementations of various fitness assignment methods.
org.moeaframework.core.selection
Package of various selection operators.

  • Uses of DominanceComparator in org.moeaframework.algorithm

    Constructors in org.moeaframework.algorithm with parameters of type DominanceComparator
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    EpsilonMOEA(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, Population population, EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive archive, Selection selection, Variation variation, Initialization initialization, DominanceComparator dominanceComparator)
    Constructs the ε-MOEA algorithm with the specified components.
     
    GDE3(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, NondominatedSortingPopulation population, DominanceComparator comparator, DifferentialEvolutionSelection selection, DifferentialEvolutionVariation variation, Initialization initialization)
    Constructs the GDE3 algorithm with the specified components.
     
    ReferencePointNondominatedSortingPopulation(int numberOfObjectives, NormalBoundaryDivisions divisions, DominanceComparator comparator)
    Constructs an empty population that maintains the rank attribute for its solutions.
     
    ReferencePointNondominatedSortingPopulation(int numberOfObjectives, NormalBoundaryDivisions divisions, DominanceComparator comparator, Iterable<? extends Solution> iterable)
    Constructs a new population with the specified solutions that maintains the rank attribute for its solutions.

    Description

    Constructs a new abstract PSO algorithm.

  • Uses of DominanceComparator in org.moeaframework.algorithm.single

    Subinterfaces of DominanceComparator in org.moeaframework.algorithm.single
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    AggregateObjectiveComparator
    Compares solutions based on a computed aggregate fitness from the objective values.
    Classes in org.moeaframework.algorithm.single that implement DominanceComparator
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractAggregateObjectiveComparator
    Abstract class for implementing comparators based on some weighted aggregate of objective values.
    class 
    LinearDominanceComparator
    Version of the weighted linear aggregate function that supports constraints.
    class 
    LinearObjectiveComparator
    The weighted linear aggregate function.
    class 
    MinMaxDominanceComparator
    Weighted min-max aggregate function that supports constraints.
    class 
    MinMaxObjectiveComparator
    Weighted min-max aggregate function.
    class 
    VectorAngleDistanceScalingComparator
    The vector angle distance scaling aggregate function.

    Field
    Description
    protected final DominanceComparator
    NondominatedPopulation.comparator
    The dominance comparator used by this non-dominated population.

    NondominatedSorting.comparator
    The dominance comparator.
    Methods in org.moeaframework.core that return DominanceComparator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DominanceComparator
    NondominatedPopulation.getComparator()
    Returns the dominance comparator used by this non-dominated population.
    DominanceComparator
    NondominatedSorting.getComparator()
    Returns the dominance comparator used by this non-dominated sorting routine.
    DominanceComparator
    NondominatedSortingPopulation.getComparator()
    Returns the dominance comparator used by this non-dominated population.
    Constructors in org.moeaframework.core with parameters of type DominanceComparator
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    FastNondominatedSorting(DominanceComparator comparator)
    Constructs a fast non-dominated sorting operator using the specified dominance comparator.
     
    NondominatedPopulation(DominanceComparator comparator)
    Constructs an empty non-dominated population using the specified dominance relation.
     
    NondominatedPopulation(DominanceComparator comparator, Iterable<? extends Solution> iterable)
    Constructs a non-dominated population using the specified dominance comparator and initialized with the specified solutions.
     
    NondominatedPopulation(DominanceComparator comparator, NondominatedPopulation.DuplicateMode duplicateMode)
    Constructs an empty non-dominated population using the specified dominance relation.
     
    NondominatedSorting(DominanceComparator comparator)
    Constructs a non-dominated sorting operator using the specified dominance comparator.
     
    NondominatedSortingPopulation(DominanceComparator comparator)
    Constructs an empty population that maintains the rank and crowdingDistance attributes for its solutions.
     
    NondominatedSortingPopulation(DominanceComparator comparator, Iterable<? extends Solution> iterable)
    Constructs a population initialized with the specified solutions that maintains the rank and crowdingDistance attributes for its solutions.

  • Uses of DominanceComparator in org.moeaframework.core.comparator

    Classes in org.moeaframework.core.comparator that implement DominanceComparator
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AggregateConstraintComparator
    Compares solutions based on their magnitude of constraint violations.
    class 
    ChainedComparator
    Applies any number of comparators in succession, returning the result from the first comparator producing a non-zero return value.
    class 
    CrowdingComparator
    Compares solutions using their crowding distance.
    class 
    EpsilonBoxDominanceComparator
    Compares two solutions using aggregate constraint violations and the additive ε-box objective comparator.
    class 
    EpsilonBoxObjectiveComparator
    Compares two solutions using the additive ε-box objective comparator.
    class 
    FitnessComparator
    Compares two solutions based on their fitness value.
    class 
    NondominatedSortingComparator
    Compares two solutions using their rank and crowding distance.
    class 
    ObjectiveComparator
    Compares two solutions using the value of a specific objective.
    class 
    ParetoConstraintComparator
    Compares solutions based on the Pareto efficiency of their constraints.
    class 
    ParetoDominanceComparator
    Compares two solutions using aggregate constraint violation and the Pareto dominance relation as originally proposed by Kalyanmoy Deb.
    class 
    ParetoObjectiveComparator
    Compares two solutions using the Pareto dominance relation on the objectives.
    class 
    RankComparator
    Compares solutions using their rank.
    Fields in org.moeaframework.core.comparator declared as DominanceComparator
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected DominanceComparator[]
    ChainedComparator.comparators
    The comparators in the order they are to be applied.
    Constructors in org.moeaframework.core.comparator with parameters of type DominanceComparator
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ChainedComparator(DominanceComparator... comparators)
    Constructs a chained comparator for applying the specified comparators in order, returning the result from the first comparator producing a non-zero return value.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    FitnessBasedArchive(FitnessEvaluator evaluator, int capacity, DominanceComparator comparator)
    Constructs an empty fitness-based archive.
     
    FitnessBasedArchive(FitnessEvaluator evaluator, int capacity, DominanceComparator comparator, Iterable<? extends Solution> iterable)
    Constructs a fitness-based archive initialized with the specified solutions.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    TournamentSelection(int size, DominanceComparator comparator)
    Constructs a tournament selection operator of the specified size and using the specified dominance comparator.
     
    TournamentSelection(DominanceComparator comparator)
    Constructs a binary tournament selection operator using the specified dominance comparator.
